dependencies.name: urllib3
dependencies.mediation: Capped at the highest 1.x release by `urllib3<2.0` in constraints.txt. poetry.lock (committed) shows urllib3==2.7.0 because Poetry does NOT read constraints.txt natively. Mend applies the range constraint independently of the lockfile. Exact patch may drift as PyPI publishes new 1.x patches; 1.26.20 is the value at probe-authoring time.

summary.constraint_applied: urllib3<2.0 via constraints.txt (range exclude, overlaid on Poetry-resolved tree)
summary.notes: poetry.lock diverges from the expected scan output at urllib3 (lock=2.7.0, scan=1.26.x). Exercises range-syntax constraint parser, not exact-pin path.
